title: Extended Tools and Ores
description: Extended Tools and Ores keeps the original essence of Minecraft adding lots of new ores and tools to the game
body:
# 🌌 Extended Tools and Ores
Extended Tools and Ores is a feature-rich Minecraft mod that redefines mining, crafting, and progression by introducing a wide variety of new ores, advanced materials, and powerful tools and armor. Unlike typical ore-based mods, this project focuses on layered refinement systems that challenge players to discover, process, and combine components in multi-step crafting chains to unlock the most powerful equipment.

This is just the beginning—Extended Tools and Ores is still in active development. Each update is built with care and guided by community feedback. Future versions will expand the material variety, improve balance, and introduce new gameplay mechanics that tie seamlessly into Minecraft’s survival loop.

If you enjoy deep progression systems, satisfying crafting challenges, and unlocking powerful gear through clever resource management, this mod is made for you.

Join us on this journey—your ideas and suggestions will help shape the future of Extended Tools and Ores! 🚀✨

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
🛡️ **Armor Set Effects – Unique Perks for Full Gear**

Extended Tools and Ores brings a new level of depth to your survival experience with armor set bonuses — passive effects that activate only when wearing a full set of matching armor.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Each armor has been designed with special perks that reflect its theme, encouraging you to adapt your equipment to your surroundings and playstyle.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
### 🔹 Current Armor Effects

- 🧜 **Aquamarine Armor**
Grants Water Breathing, perfect for ocean exploration and underwater ruins.
  
- 🌊**Enhanced Aquamarine Armor**
Adds Dolphin’s Grace along with Water Breathing for unmatched underwater speed.
   
- ⚡ **Aluminum Armor**
  Increases movement speed, ideal for fast travel and navigating terrain quickly.
  
- 💎 **Ruby Armor**
Activates Strength II when your health drops below 50%, giving you a burst of power in critical moments.
  
- ⛏️ **Amber Armor**
Gives Haste to improve mining speed, but comes with Unluck — a strategic risk/reward tradeoff.

## 🧪 Coming Soon: More Armor Effects!
We’re actively working to assign unique passive effects to every armor set, enriching progression and build variety. For example, Emerald Armor is planned to grant Luck, making it ideal for exploring structures and collecting rare loot.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
These effects only trigger when wearing the full armor set, ensuring balance and rewarding commitment to each material path.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
💬 Have ideas or feedback? We’re building this mod with the community in mind, and your suggestions could directly influence future content. Join us on Discord or leave a comment with your ideas!
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────



# 🛠️ Patch Notes – Release 0.0.7
Extended Tools and Ores continues to evolve, and this update marks another major step toward creating a deeper, more rewarding survival experience. As a solo-developed project, each patch is shaped not just by vision, but by community feedback — so your thoughts are more than welcome.

This version introduces important balancing changes, key fixes, and one of the most exciting features so far: armor set effects.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## 🌟 NEW: Full Armor Set Effects
Wearing a full set of specific armors will now grant passive effects to the player — adding a strategic layer to your gear choices. These effects range from utility buffs to potential combat enhancements, rewarding those who commit to a full set with tangible in-game advantages.

This is just the first step in our vision of unique gear identities. Future updates will expand on this system, introducing specialized armor roles, synergy with tools, and rare crafting materials that further empower your build style.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## ✅ Other Additions & Improvements
🛡️ Aluminum Armor Equip Sound Added
The missing equip sound has been implemented for the Aluminum set, improving immersion and polish.

### ⚖️ Armor Rebalancing
All existing armors have been rebalanced to better align with vanilla standards, ensuring fair progression without overwhelming early-game experience.

### 🛠️ Bug Fixes
🪓 Tool Speed Restored
Fixed a major issue causing pickaxes, axes, and shovels to function at abnormally slow speeds. Tools now operate with their intended efficiency.

### 📦 Vaulted Content
Several tools and armors (including some enhanced versions) have been temporarily vaulted to reduce clutter and streamline gameplay. This is part of a long-term effort to make each item feel meaningful and well-integrated.
**➤ Vaulted items are not removed forever** — many will return in future updates with reworks or added mechanics.

### 🧪 The Journey Continues
This mod is still in early development, and your feedback helps shape every decision. Future updates will bring more materials, advanced refining systems, and deeper integration of gear-based progression.

Whether you’re here for the fantasy, the mechanics, or the grind — thank you for being part of the journey.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
### REPORTING ISSUES
For reporting issues, you may contact me in discord as zeluxx. You may post any issues you find there. Reporting issues in alphas and betas is highly encouraged so it can be dealt with right away.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## DISCORD SERVER
We're building a community hub for all things related with our mod! Whether you want to discuss features, report bugs, suggest ideas, or just hang out, this is the place to be.

⚒️ What to Expect:
- ✅ Exclusive sneak peeks & updates
- ✅ Direct interaction with the developer
- ✅ A space to share your feedback & ideas
- ✅ Future events, polls, and giveaways

The server is still under construction, but we’d love to have you there from the start! Help shape the future of the mod and be part of an awesome community.
